surprise_log.observation: A household-spouse acute Type-A aortic dissection emergent presentation tipped onto the household-side living-room sofa-edge late-Thursday-evening: the household-spouse with a documented long-standing essential-hypertension treated on amlodipine-and-losartan combination plus a marginally-elevated outpatient surveillance blood-pressure cycle plus a connective-tissue family-history flag on the maternal-side aortic-aneurysm cluster surfaced sudden-onset severe tearing inter-scapular-and-anterior-chest pain radiating into the upper-back-and-jaw-and-neck distribution plus migrating-pain-pattern moving from the inter-scapular band down into the lumbar-and-flank distribution plus pulse-deficit asymmetry on the bedside radial-pulse survey with diminished left-radial pulse against the preserved right-radial pulse plus a twenty-millimeter-mercury blood-pressure asymmetry on the bedside cuff-pull between the right-arm and left-arm cycle plus diaphoresis-and-clammy-skin perfusion picture plus mild-aortic-insufficiency early-diastolic murmur on the bedside cardiac auscultation pass plus altered-mental-status mild-confusion picture on the bedside neurologic survey consistent with a household-spouse acute Type-A aortic dissection presentation moving onto early end-organ-malperfusion physiology. The household-adult punched the nine-one-one emergency-services number into the household-side living-room cordless-handset keypad within roughly three minutes of the symptom-onset-and-bedside-survey sequence and the township paramedic-unit emergency-response crew rolled onto the household-side residence on a five-minute response-window pull plus a pre-arrival regional Heart-and-Vascular-Institute aortic-dissection-emergent-activation phone-line guidance on the household-side at-home holding-pattern band covering the bedside lay-flat position-and-pressure-relief posture plus the household-adult-side phone-line continuous-symptom-update cadence ahead of paramedic-unit arrival. The paramedic-unit on-scene workup bundle executed the focused triage assessment pinning the acute Type-A aortic dissection presentation plus bilateral wide-bore peripheral IV-line setup plus the initial twelve-lead-electrocardiogram ECG ruling out concomitant ST-elevation myocardial infarction STEMI pattern plus the initial point-of-care troponin-and-D-dimer pull plus the per-protocol blood-pressure-and-heart-rate impulse-control target band initiation on bolus esmolol-and-labetalol short-acting beta-blocker infusion-cycle targeting systolic-blood-pressure-under-one-hundred-and-twenty plus heart-rate-under-sixty followed by sodium-nitroprusside vasodilator titration on the supplemental-vasodilator cycle plus the per-protocol fentanyl-and-morphine multimodal-analgesia loading-pass plus the per-protocol pre-arrival regional Heart-and-Vascular-Institute aortic-emergent activation continuous-radio-channel handoff cadence with on-call cardiothoracic-and-vascular-surgery attending Dr. Aubrey Caldecott and on-call cardiothoracic-anesthesia attending Dr. Marisol Pendleton joined onto the pre-arrival handoff bridge call. The regional Heart-and-Vascular-Institute ED-emergent-intake workup bundle on the household-spouse arrival cycle threaded the abbreviated bedside transthoracic-echocardiogram TTE imaging pass confirming the ascending-aortic dissection-flap-and-intimal-tear imaging signature plus the rapid contrast-enhanced computed-tomography-angiography CTA chest-abdomen-and-pelvis study confirming the DeBakey-Type-I Stanford-Type-A ascending-aortic dissection extending into the aortic-arch-and-descending-thoracic-aortic-and-abdominal-aortic distribution plus the aortic-root-and-aortic-valve involvement assessment on the per-protocol aortic-root pull plus the coronary-ostia involvement assessment on the per-protocol coronary-ostia pull plus the bedside cardiac-rhythm telemetry on the per-protocol arrhythmia surveillance band. The emergent cardiothoracic-surgery activation cycle threaded the door-to-operating-room sixty-minute window target with the household-spouse riding from the ED-emergent-intake bay onto the regional Heart-and-Vascular-Institute cardiothoracic-surgical-suite-table inside a fifty-two-minute door-to-skin-incision window under combined general-endotracheal-anesthesia-and-cardiopulmonary-bypass-CPB induction plus the median-sternotomy approach plus the cardiopulmonary-bypass-CPB initiation on the per-protocol aortic-and-bicaval cannulation cycle plus the deep-hypothermic-circulatory-arrest DHCA cooling pass on the eighteen-to-twenty-degree-Celsius target plus the open ascending-aortic dissection repair-and-graft replacement on the Dacron-tube-graft prosthesis cycle plus the aortic-valve-resuspension-or-Bentall composite-aortic-root replacement decision pass on the preserved-or-failed aortic-valve picture plus the hemi-arch-or-total-arch replacement decision pass on the preserved-or-extended arch-involvement picture plus the antegrade-cerebral-perfusion ACP cycle on the brain-protection pathway plus the rewarming-and-weaning-from-CPB pass on the post-graft cardiothoracic-side recovery cycle.
